prose.en: Critical suppliers are assessed prior to acquisition
Conduct supplier risk assessments against business and applicable cybersecurity requirements, including the supply chain

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.SC-02
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.SC-02
nist-withdrawal.prose: Suppliers and third party partners of information systems, components, and services are identified, prioritized, and assessed using a cyber supply chain risk assessment process

nist-withdrawal.label: ID.SC-04
nist-withdrawal.title: ID.SC-04
nist-withdrawal.prose: Suppliers and third-party partners are routinely assessed using audits, test results, or other forms of evaluations to confirm they are meeting their contractual obligations.
